summary: Iteration 168: Tested async backup system rewrite. Fixed missing Badge import in SettingsPage.js. All 16 backend tests pass. Frontend Backup tab working correctly after fix.

fixed_by_testing_agent.issue: Missing Badge component import caused 'ReferenceError: Badge is not defined' when opening Backup tab

critical_code_review_comments: Async backup implementation is solid: start returns backup_id, status polling works, download works when complete
Manifest format correct: version 2.0, app, created_at, user_id, user_email, collections count, total_records
BACKUP_COLLECTIONS correctly includes perizie and sopralluoghi with proper pk_map entries
_strip_large_base64 correctly strips >10KB base64 strings starting with 'data:'
Frontend handleExport correctly implements async flow: POST /start → poll /status → download when completato

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Backup tab working after Badge import fix)

seed_data_creation: Created test user with 1 commessa and 1 client for backup testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Async backup system fully tested: POST /start returns backup_id+status='in_corso', GET /status/{id} returns progress and transitions to 'completato', GET /download/{id} returns JSON with manifest and data. Legacy /export endpoint also works. Restore accepts both manifest (2.0) and metadata (legacy) formats. Frontend correctly shows progress text during polling and downloads file on completion. History section shows Auto/Manuale badges.

test_features_verified.GET /api/admin/backup/status/{backup_id}: PASSED - Returns status, progress, error, total_records, size_bytes, filename
test_features_verified.GET /api/admin/backup/download/{backup_i: PASSED - Returns JSON file when status=completato, 400 if not complete
test_features_verified.GET /api/admin/backup/export: PASSED - Legacy sync export still works
test_features_verified.GET /api/admin/backup/history: PASSED - Returns list with auto flag
test_features_verified.POST /api/admin/backup/restore: PASSED - Accepts both manifest and metadata formats, merge and wipe modes
test_features_verified.Backup manifest format: PASSED - version 2.0, app, created_at, user_id, collections, total_records
test_features_verified.Base64 stripping: PASSED - Large base64 strings replaced with __BASE64_STRIPPED__
test_features_verified.perizie/sopralluoghi in BACKUP_COLLECTIO: PASSED - Both collections included with pk_map entries
test_features_verified.Frontend Crea Backup button: PASSED - Shows progress during polling, downloads file when complete
test_features_verified.Frontend history Auto/Manuale badges: PASSED - Badge component now properly imported and working
